name: Wayward Ship
descriptionTemplate: Gain 1 Arithmetica, and apply 5 stacks of {Birth Ritual} to all enemies. If "Murphy: Fauxborn" is in the team, draw 1 {Waltz of Lemuria}.
lore: The Apostle of the Sea kneels devoutly at the Maiden's feet, offering a kiss of fidelity—she has traveled too far on the wrong course.
